subcodes.first_line: O Baba Khan! Verily, We have summoned all unto the Most Exalted Horizon and guided them unto My Straight Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بابا خان انا دعونا الکل الی الافق الاعلی و هدیناهم الی صراطی المستقیم چون
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
